creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
There is also bug 258924 and bug 259111. The card is probably the Fermi-based GT 710 or 730. One of these complaints seems to involve using the binary packages compiled for 13.0 with STABLE, which works as poorly as it is supposed to. Another looks like it might be the usual EFI_STAGING_SIZE thing, although I'm not sure if there are any EFI-compatible 710/730s in the first place.

Also, I hope I'll never see "funnywise" again.
